bullets: Developed and maintained the entire frontend of Aleedz's admin panel using React.js.
Built dynamic dashboards, data tables, filter systems, dropdowns, modals, and image previews.
Integrated APIs using Axios and managed global state efficiently with Redux Toolkit for smoother data flow and optimized performance.
Implemented pagination, search, and sorting functionality for efficient data handling
Enabled Excel export functionality using XLSX for reporting and data accessibility.
Developed client and admin-side features using React.js and Next.js.
Implemented authentication (login/registration), dynamic filters, and UI styling with MUI & CSS.

testimonials.text: Atta did some great work, very dedicated in getting it right and delivering quality code. Will hire again for sure.
testimonials.author: Alex Tauber

testimonials.text: Atta is consistently exceptional! This is the third time I’ve hired him, and once again, he delivered outstanding results.
testimonials.author: Upwork Client

testimonials.text: Atta is an amazingly talented guy who fixed a bug within 24 hours that my three developers couldn’t fix in a week.
testimonials.author: Upwork Client

testimonials.text: Very thorough developer, capable of solving problems. Will work again with him.

testimonials.text: Atta provided great devops help to our project. He is skilled and highly recommended!
